target.label: Invariants knowledge files (INVARIANTS/AGENTS/CLAUDE/RALPH) with promotion rules

rationale: Documentation-artefact story whose § Testing Standards explicitly defers per-AC automated coverage to Stories 1.8 (invariants.manifest.ts) + 1.9 (FR43 sync-gate) + Epic 3 (RS6 lint). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; the waiver is stakeholder-authored in the story file itself. All substrate quality gates (typecheck / lint / format:check / commitlint / prek-runner) landed green at dev-story.
